Auth uses shared Supabase client wrapper

usage_snippets.code: export const resetSchema = z.object({ email: z.string().email() })

docs_context.title: resetPasswordForEmail
docs_context.content:
Sends a password reset request to an email address. Requires the email address of the user.

```js
const { data, error } = await supabase.auth.resetPasswordForEmail('user@example.com', {
  redirectTo: 'https://example.com/update-password',
})
```

Parameters:
- email (required): The email address of the user.
- options.redirectTo (optional): The URL to send the user to after they click the password reset link.
- options.captchaToken (optional): Verification token from a CAPTCHA provider.

Returns: A promise that resolves to an object with `data` and `error` properties.

docs_context.title: Basic string validation
